infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Void Count uses the microphone to let you speak numbers during a round.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Void Count transcribes your spoken numbers on-device to submit them to the game.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Void Count to use the microphone.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow Void Count to transcribe your speech.
